extDescription.message: Save, restore, and manage your browser sessions with one click. Auto-save protects your tabs before shutdown, sleep, or low battery.

saveAndClose.description: Button label for saving and closing tabs

allWindows.description: Button label for saving all windows

restoreSession.description: Button label for restoring a session

deleteSession.description: Button label for deleting a session

noSessionsDesc.message: Save your current tabs to get started. Sessions will appear here.

confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete this session?

clearAllDataWarning.message: This will permanently delete all saved sessions, auto-saves, and settings. This action cannot be undone.

undoDelete.description: Undo delete action label in toast

editTabs.description: Toggle tab edit mode button in session detail

compareSessions.description: Compare/diff sessions button in bulk toolbar

duplicateWarning.message: Session looks identical to a recent save

savedGroups.description: Saved tab group templates tab label

noTabGroupsDesc.message: Group your tabs in Chrome to see them here

noAutoSavesDesc.message: Auto-saves appear when triggered by browser close, sleep, low battery, or timer

storageLabel.description: Sessions stats bar — storage usage label

nSaved.description: Sessions count suffix in panel header
